# MikeOK — Yiwu Sourcing Agent & B2B Wholesale Supplier

> MikeOK is a Yiwu-based B2B sourcing agent and wholesale supplier. We connect global importers, distributors, retailers, Amazon sellers, and wholesale buyers with verified Chinese factories across 7 industrial and hardware product categories.

We support product sourcing, factory negotiation, quality inspection, mixed wholesale consolidation, FBA prep, custom packaging, and global shipping from Yiwu, China.

## Core Services

- Product Sourcing & Supplier Matching
- Quality Control & Pre-shipment Inspection
- Mixed Wholesale Consolidation
- FBA Prep & Labeling
- Custom Packaging & Branding
- Global Shipping & Logistics

## Product Categories

- Door Hardware — hinges, handles, sliding door systems, cabinet hardware
- Fasteners — bolts, screws, nuts, washers, anchors, rivets
- Rigging & Lifting — shackles, turnbuckles, wire rope fittings, chain accessories
- Locks & Security — smart locks, door locks, padlocks, bike locks
- Solar Products — solar panels, portable solar, RV solar kits
- Wind Power Products — wind turbines, wind generators, hybrid systems
- Hand Tools & Automotive — wrenches, screwdrivers, pliers, tool sets

## Buyer Types

Importers, distributors, supermarket buyers, hardware store owners, Amazon FBA sellers, Shopify sellers, construction material suppliers, renewable energy distributors, and promotional product buyers.

## Trade Terms

- MOQ: Negotiable — small trial orders and mixed wholesale supported
- Samples: Available
- Customization: Logo, packaging, color, minor product adjustments
- Payment: 30% deposit, 70% before shipment
- Shipping: Sea freight, air freight, express courier, door-to-door

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +86-159-5793-6921

- WeChat: mikeok_yiwu
- Office: Yiwu International Trade City, Zhejiang, China
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9:00-18:00 (GMT+8)
